pageNotFound: The page you are looking for does not exist.
errorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to perform this action.
INSTITUTE_CODE_DUPLICATE: An institute with this code already exists.
INSTITUTE_EMAIL_DUPLICATE: An institute with this primary email already exists.
SETUP_NOT_COMPLETE: Institute setup must be completed before activation.
RESELLER_INVALID: The selected reseller is not found or inactive.
SYSTEM_RESELLER_PROTECTED: The system reseller cannot be modified.
CONCURRENT_MODIFICATION: This record was modified by another user. Please refresh and try again.
ACADEMIC_YEAR_OVERLAP: The date range overlaps with an existing academic year.
INVALID_DATE_RANGE: Start date must be before end date.
LAST_ACADEMIC_YEAR: Cannot delete the last remaining academic year.
YEAR_ALREADY_ACTIVE: Another academic year is already active.
STANDARD_NAME_DUPLICATE: A standard with this name already exists in this academic year.
SECTION_NAME_DUPLICATE: A section with this name already exists in this standard.
HAS_ACTIVE_ENROLLMENTS: Cannot delete — students are currently enrolled.
HAS_RECORDED_ASSESSMENTS: Cannot delete — assessments have been recorded.
STREAM_REQUIRED: A stream must be selected for this standard.
SUBJECT_CODE_DUPLICATE: This board code is already used by another subject in this standard.
